title: Announcements
content:
Announcements

International Registered Students

Announcements

24
						October

2025

The

Istanbul Metropolitan Municipality, Department of Culture

, is organizing an exciting event for university students —

“Welcome Week’25”

, a

that will take place on

October 25, 2025

, at

Müze Gazhane

.

Starting at

3:00 PM

, the festival will offer

workshops, game zones, live music, competitions, and gifts

main stage concerts and DJ performances

in the evening.

A

free shuttle

will depart from

Tuzla Campus at 1:30 PM

and return from the venue at

10:30 PM

.

All you need to join is a

valid university student ID

.

Click for the detailed info.

Don’t miss this unforgettable event full of music, fun, and new friendships!

en

tr
